notes: v1.2.35: Fixed dangerous QApplication.processEvents() loop in image capture with proper QEventLoop. Added more defensive pixmap checks and timeline logging. v1.2.34: Fixed updater batch script bug. Added debug logging to image dialog. v1.2.33: Fixed progress bar loop reset. v1.2.32: Fixed crash when adding image actions to timeline — removed duplicate scene.addItem in _draw_image and added scene() guards before removeItem. v1.2.31: Fixed cv2 startup crash with noarchive=True. v1.2.30: Fixed timeline playback with pyqtSignal. v1.2.29: cv2 collect_all fix. v1.2.28: Excluded tkinter.
